headline: BofA Remains Bullish on ONEOK (OKE) – Here’s Why
summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) is one of the best NYSE stocks to buy for long-term investment. BofA lifted the price target on ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) to $96 from $94 on May 27 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. It told investors in a fiscal Q1 earnings recap for the group that results from the midstream group […]
